25:19 â September 11, 2025
Update to Provincial Concentrator Account Deposits (BC)
The Provincial Concentrator Account Deposits (BC) Part was substantively edited and reorganized. As a result, some chapters have been renamed and sections renumbered. In addition, users are now referred to the Deposit Processing Part for content related to processing cheques included in Provincial Concentrator Account deposits.
